OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Allow Any Launch to Transmit Signal
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Allow Any Launch to Transmit Signal

OptionDescription.SourceString: Determines whether to trigger When Launched Transmit On when any object touches the crash pad (rather than just players or vehicles containing players).
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Determines whether to trigger When Launched Transmit On when any object touches the crash pad (rather than just players or vehicles containing players).
